dracolotl_check.title: Find your Dracolotl companion (Ch04) — confirm it still lives, bring it to your base

trigon_home.title: Bring your tamed Baby Trigon to the Overworld — your End companion returns with you

subtitle.text: You left the Dracolotl behind in Ch04. You tamed the Trigon in Ch14. The homecoming includes them both.

description: CH.15 · THE COMPANIONS RETURN
▸ The companions thread is the Frieren thread.
Frieren traveled for 1000 years.
She kept finding the people and places she had left behind.
You tamed the Dracolotl in Ch04.
You tamed the Baby Trigon in Ch14.
The homecoming is not complete until both are home.
◈ THE DRACOLOTL
└ Hatched in Ch04 from an egg found in ocean biomes
└ Dracolotl abilities: swims, flies short distances,
expels water jet, scales walls
└ Left behind: likely at Ch04 base or somewhere in the Overworld
└ Find it: if you built a home for it (water tank, base pond),
check there first
└ If lost: Dracolotl can be re-tamed with a new egg from ocean
(Ocean Monument adjacent biome — Drowned/warm ocean floors)
└ Bring it to your Ch15 base: build a dedicated Dracolotl habitat
(stone + water pool + enclosed swim area)
◈ THE BABY TRIGON
└ Tamed in Ch14 (The Baby Trigon quest)
└ Crossing dimensions: tamed mobs can return through End portal
Lead the Trigon to the End portal → they follow through
└ If Trigon is too large for portal: check mod behavior
(some dragon mods have a 'call' mechanic for cross-dimension)
└ Overworld behavior: Trigon adapts to Overworld after End
(no longer gets the End dimension bonus — but still fights)
◈ COMPANION HOUSING
└ Build dedicated areas at your main base for each companion
Dracolotl: water feature with swim space
Baby Trigon: large outdoor pen or stable with End Stone decor
└ Feed them regularly: companion mobs may have hunger mechanics
└ Name tags: both should be named to prevent despawn
└ The base that houses both companions is the kingdom proper
▸ Fern (Frieren's apprentice) never understood why Frieren
went back to look for things she had left behind.
The companions were left in Ch04.
It is Ch15.
You went back.
That is the answer Fern needed.
▶ Find your Dracolotl and bring it home [check]
▶ Bring the Baby Trigon to the Overworld [check]
◇ The Companions quest is primarily narrative.
The reward is not the items — it is the completion.
A home with a Dracolotl in the pond and a Trigon in the yard
is the Ch15 aesthetic.
Build it that way.
